reviews.review_description: This game does everything right that other games couldn’t good graphics it’s realistic you actually look like a gorilla and one of my favorite parts is that you can use your hands to move and you can walk with your feet using the joystick when it comes to vr it’s all about coming to a new reality or a new world and this game hits the spot plus you have guns this game is in early access do it does have some bugs but it could be one if not the best free vr game

reviews.review_title: One of the most underrated games ever!!
reviews.review_description: Once I saw this game I instantly got it. I wanted to test out this game because I thought it was a free zombie game. Although it wasn’t, it was a brilliant deathmatch game which me and my friends really enjoyed. We’ve played this all day today and planning to play it all week! Good combat and blood. One recommendation is that would be good is too add more guns, melee weapons, new maps, graphic changes like blood and environment, attachments to guns and other game modes. Overall 10/10 game!!

reviews.review_title: The best VR shooter in my opinion
reviews.review_description:
I think it’s great. They have the gorilla tag movements and joystick movements. It has amazing graphics. Everybody’s so nice in the game in the map is beautiful overall just a five star great game. 
￼
The game was so unexpected but it is awesome.I hope this game continues to have updates, new maps, and new weapons.

reviews.review_title: Amazing for a new game in beta
reviews.review_description: It’s so fun and it’s like lethal ape but better ounce the full game comes out you should add different guns
I love this just I think it would be cool if they added more weapons and private codes and different maps and cosmetics

developer_response.body: Thanks for the love! And we're definitely working on all of that!

reviews.review_description: Good game good models but don’t add mods
Make more updates add clothing,hats,ect also can you add a shotgun?
The movement isn’t good but it isn’t bad and the guns are good and it’s really fun they just need to make more maps and guns
This game is a must play if your bored it is very fun can’t wait for future updates.
